title: Social Media Manager
description: Manage all social media platforms (4 priority: Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, YouTube) with posting, engagement, and performance analytics
context: Executes social media content calendar, posts to all platforms according to platform-specific SOPs, manages social media engagement and community, monitors social media analytics and performance, responds to comments and messages, coordinates with Copywriter and Content Strategist for content and scheduling, implements Alex Hormozi frameworks on platforms, and monitors platform performance to optimize posting times and content types
daily_priorities: Schedule and post content across platforms
